name: Firecrawl
description: Web scraping and data extraction. This official Firecrawl MCP integration is installable through Cline.

env.name: FIRECRAWL_API_KEY
env.description: Firecrawl API key for crawling and scraping.

install.notes: Transport from source catalog: stdio; optional streamable HTTP. Auth from source catalog: Firecrawl API key or OAuth bearer. Official Firecrawl org repo; docs show local HTTP mode at http://localhost:3000/mcp.
